'''Azul Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The unit, equipped with [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], was based on the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Colada]]''. It fought against the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] during the latter's attack on the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]]-owned supply platform in the [[Goff system/Legends|Goff system]]. There, realizing that the most serious danger to the craft evacuating the platform came from the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'', the Z-95s made that vessel their primary target, attacking it with [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. The squadron was no match for the attacking [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, however, and was torn to shreds by the modified [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] of [[Avenger Squadron]].
